title: Error-First Debugging
description: Give AI an error message and the code that caused it to get a plain-English explanation and a specific fix.

variables.name: ERROR_MESSAGE
variables.description: Paste the exact error message from your browser console or terminal
variables.example: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map')

variables.name: LANGUAGE
variables.description: The programming language (js, html, css, python, etc.)

variables.name: CODE_BLOCK
variables.description: Paste the code that produced the error

exampleOutput: The error 'TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading map)' means you are trying to call .map() on a value that is undefined — meaning the variable doesn't exist yet when your code runs. This usually happens when data hasn't loaded yet from an API...
author: Krosebrook
